/CAL:RPII'S MOTION TO EXTEND TIME ON BAIL FORFEITURE & CITY ATTORNEY'S NON-OPPOSITION/NP/MO GRTD/CTORD:THE BAIL FORFEITURE PERIOD IS EXTENDED TO 10-12-20/X:THE COURT HAS EXPRESSED DISPLEASURE WITH THE CITY ATTORNEY'S OFFICE FOR NOT ONLY NOT SUBMITTING A FORMAL NON-OPPOSITION, BUT SUBMITTING ONLYA 2-SENTENCE EMAIL STATING THEIR NON-OPPOSITION/X:BENCH WARRANT REMAINS OUTSTANDING,  NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT,/
